VEL.BMGM 0.2.1
  • Reference
    • Recovery of varying coefficients

Package index

Main fitting function

bmgm_GP()
Bayesian Mixed Graphical Model with Varying Coefficient Logistic Regression

Prediction

predict_jbmgm()
Predict with VEL-BMGM Model

Post-fit summaries

summary_bmgm()
Summary of VEL-BMGM Model Fit
pip_table()
Posterior Inclusion Probability Table
coef_summary()
Coefficient Summary Table
edge_table()
Edge Posterior Inclusion Probability Table
gp_summary()
GP Component Summary

Plots

plot_varying_coefficients()
Plot Varying Coefficients
plot_pip_heatmap()
Plot PPI Heatmap
plot_pip_bar()
Plot PPI Bar Chart
plot_graph()
Plot Predictor Graph
plot_trace()
MCMC Traceplots
plot_roc()
Plot ROC Curve

Metrics

classification_metrics()
Classification Metrics
selection_metrics()
Selection Metrics
posterior_predictive_check()
Posterior Predictive Check

Internals (kernel and MCMC helpers)

kernel_se()
Squared Exponential Kernel
compute_Cj_var()
Compute Cj Variance and XCXt Matrix
compute_Sigma_Y()
Compute Sigma_Y for Prediction
update_beta_j()
Update Beta_j for Bayesian Logistic Model
update_beta_0()
Update Intercept Beta_0 for Bayesian Logistic Model
update_tau_w()
Update Tau_w Hyperparameter for GP Priors

S3 methods

print(<vel_bmgm>)
Print Method for VEL-BMGM Fit Objects
plot(<vel_bmgm>)
Plot Method for VEL-BMGM Fit Objects
